infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Carnet uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice notes into journal entries.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Carnet uses the microphone to capture voice notes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Carnet uses the camera to capture business cards for the contact mode.

plugins.cameraPermission: Carnet uses the camera to capture business cards for contacts.
